title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Arihant Publications

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Arihant Publications
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
